name: Spinach omelette
steps: Whisk the eggs with a splash of milk, salt and pepper.
Melt butter in a nonstick pan over medium heat and wilt the spinach.
Pour in the eggs and cook until just set, then add the cheese.
Fold in half and serve.

name: Tomato garlic pasta
steps: Cook the pasta in salted water until al dente.
Soften diced onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add chopped tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
Toss the pasta through the sauce and season.

name: Black bean quesadillas
steps: Sauté diced onion and bell pepper until soft.
Mash the beans lightly and spread over half of each tortilla.
Top with the vegetables and cheese, then fold.
Toast in a dry pan until golden on both sides.

name: Veggie fried rice
steps: Cook the rice ahead of time and let it cool.
Scramble the eggs in a hot wok and set aside.
Stir fry onion, garlic and bell pepper, then add the rice.
Return the eggs, season with soy sauce and toss.

name: Shakshuka
steps: Soften onion, garlic and bell pepper in olive oil.
Add chopped tomatoes and cumin, simmer until thick.
Make wells in the sauce and crack in the eggs.
Cover and cook until the whites are set.

name: Spinach and rice bowl
steps: Cook the rice until fluffy.
Wilt the spinach with garlic in olive oil.
Fold the spinach through the rice.
Finish with lemon juice and season well.

name: Cheese and bean burritos
steps: Warm the beans with a pinch of cumin.
Lay rice, beans, diced tomato and cheese on each tortilla.
Roll tightly, tucking in the ends.
Toast seam side down until sealed.

name: Tomato and pepper frittata
steps: Sauté onion, pepper and tomato in an ovenproof pan.
Whisk eggs with milk and pour over the vegetables.
Scatter the cheese on top.
Bake at 180C until set and golden.

name: Garlic butter rice with eggs
steps: Cook the rice and keep it warm.
Brown the garlic gently in butter and stir through the rice.
Fry the eggs to your liking.
Serve the eggs over the rice.

name: Creamy spinach pasta
steps: Cook the pasta and reserve a cup of the water.
Make a quick sauce with butter, garlic, milk and parmesan.
Wilt the spinach into the sauce.
Toss with the pasta, loosening with pasta water.

name: Chicken fajitas
steps: Slice the chicken and season generously.
Sear until cooked through, then set aside.
Char the sliced pepper and onion in the same pan.
Serve in warm tortillas with a squeeze of lime.

name: Chicken and rice soup
steps: Sweat the onion, carrot and celery until soft.
Add garlic, chicken and stock, then simmer.
Shred the chicken and add the rice.
Cook until the rice is tender and season.

name: Beef tacos
steps: Brown the beef with diced onion and spices.
Warm the tortillas.
Fill with beef, tomato, lettuce and cheese.
Serve straight away.

name: Egg curry
steps: Hard boil the eggs and peel them.
Cook onion and garlic down, then add tomato and curry powder.
Simmer into a thick sauce and add the halved eggs.
Serve over rice.

name: Stuffed bell peppers
steps: Halve the peppers and remove the seeds.
Mix cooked rice, beans, tomato and onion.
Fill the peppers and top with cheese.
Bake at 190C until the peppers are tender.

name: Salmon with garlic spinach
steps: Season the salmon and sear skin side down.
Finish with a knob of butter, basting as it cooks.
Wilt the spinach with garlic in the same pan.
Serve with lemon.
